7GUIs Counter - Svelte

Result

Source

Bundle sizes:
2.82 kB minified
1.33 kB Gzip
1.2 kB Brotli
  • Counter.html
  • index.js
<script>
	let count = 0;
</script>

<button
	class="btn badge"
	data-badge="{count}"
	style="margin-top: .5rem"
	on:click="{() => count += 1}"
>
	count: {count}
</button>
import App from "./Counter.html";

new App({
	target: document.getElementById("app")
});

Built with ♥ by Andre Wiggins. Styled using Spectre.css
